dev.purpose: Start the local Chrome extension development server with WXT.

build.purpose: Run all static checks and produce the WXT Chrome extension bundle in .output.

zip.purpose: Run all static checks and create a Chrome Web Store upload ZIP with WXT.

postinstall.purpose: Generate WXT TypeScript support files after dependency installation.

check.purpose: Run the custom package-scripts guard plus Vite+ formatting, linting, and type checks.

icons:generate.purpose: Regenerate Chrome Web Store PNG icons from the local icon renderer.
